title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. carpatica
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. carpatica, also known as mountain kidney vetch, is a subspecies of the kidney vetch plant that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, mountain kidney vetch can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
